strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React matching the primary stack
Direct AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at current role re:cinq
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, founded Fluent-Asserts and Trial test runner)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java experience is dated (robotic arms work pre-2018)
No explicit cloud platform breadth shown beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz; Kubernetes only mentioned for GISCollective deployment

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with well-aligned primary stack experience (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq. Testing expertise is exceptional, having authored test frameworks. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js experience and dated Java/Kotlin exposure, but the breadth of languages and architecture experience suggests quick ramp-up on framework specifics.
